ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., Blood Test, Urine Test) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., Blood, Urine, Imaging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_cost" REAL /* Cost of the test */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory performing the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Creatinine, Hemoglobin) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "normal_range_low" REAL /* Lower limit of the normal range */,
  "normal_range_high" REAL /* Upper limit of the normal range */,
  "critical_value" REAL /* Critical value that triggers an alert */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the parameter is required for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parameters_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the result belongs to */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the result belongs to */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  "class" TEXT /* Classification of the result (e.g., NO, AE) */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who ordered the test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the test result */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the result has been confirmed by a medical professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the value belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "is_abnormal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the value is outside the normal range */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of any alerts triggered by the value (e.g., 'normal', 'warning', 'critical') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_values_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* List of medical conditions */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Doctor, Nurse, Administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure login */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the generated report file in bytes */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report has been archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the laboratory */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the laboratory */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physicians" (
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physician */,
  "physician_name" TEXT /* Name of the physician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the physician */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the physician belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the physician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the physician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_notes_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the image */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the image was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_images_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_images_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
